content:
**Last updated: February 2026**

At Iseyon Analytics, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you visit our website, [www.iseyon.com](https://www.iseyon.com).

## 1. Information We Collect

When you visit our website or engage with our services, we may collect the following types of information:

- Full name and email address (provided via contact or newsletter forms)
- Company name and job title (where voluntarily provided)
- Usage data and browsing behaviour (via analytics cookies)

We do not collect sensitive personal data such as health information, biometric data, or financial account details.

## 2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect to:

- Respond to your enquiries and provide our data analytics and business intelligence services
- Send relevant communications about our services (with your consent where required)
- Improve our website, analyse traffic patterns, and enhance user experience
- Comply with applicable legal requirements

## 3. Data Sharing and Disclosure

We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your data with trusted service providers (such as email delivery platforms and analytics tools) who process data on our behalf. We may also disclose data where required by applicable law or to protect the rights of Iseyon Analytics.

## 4. Data Retention

We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy or as required by law.

| Purpose | Approximate Retention Period |
|---|---|
| Enquiry and contact form submissions | Up to 24 months |
| Newsletter subscribers | Until unsubscription |
| Service delivery records | Up to 5 years |

You may contact us at any time to request deletion or correction of your data.

## 5. Your Privacy Choices

You may contact us to:

- Request access to the personal information we hold about you
- Request correction of inaccurate information
- Request deletion of your personal data (subject to any overriding operational or legal requirements)
- Opt out of marketing communications at any time

To make any such request, please email us at [info@iseyon.com](mailto:info@iseyon.com) or use our [Contact page](https://www.iseyon.com/contact). We aim to respond within 30 days.

## 6. Security

We apply industry-standard security measures to protect your information, including TLS/SSL encryption in transit and appropriate access controls. No transmission over the internet is guaranteed to be 100% secure; however, we take all reasonable steps to protect your data.

## 7. Cookies and Tracking

Our website uses cookies to support functionality and collect analytics data. We use:

- **Essential cookies** — required for website operation
- **Analytics cookies** — to understand how visitors interact with our site (e.g., via Google Analytics)

You may manage or disable cookies through your browser settings at any time.

## 8. Children's Privacy

Our website is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has submitted information through our website, please contact us at [info@iseyon.com](mailto:info@iseyon.com) and we will promptly remove it.

## 9. International Visitors

Our website is operated from the United States. If you access our site from outside the United States, please be aware that information you provide may be transferred to and processed in the United States.

## 10. Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your information, please contact us:

**Iseyon Analytics**
Email: [info@iseyon.com](mailto:info@iseyon.com)
Website: [www.iseyon.com/contact](https://www.iseyon.com/contact)

## 11. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with a revised date. We encourage you to review this page periodically.
